UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT HOME CREDIT LAW CENTER AND BRIAN LINNEKENS'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. OVERRULED AS TO LINNEKENS, DBA HOME CREDIT LAW CENTER. COMPLAINT SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES ENGAGEMENT OF HOME CREDIT LAW CENTER FOR LOAN ANALYSIS AND MODIFICATION PURPOSES. SEE SAC 8-9, EXS. A, B AND C. COMPLAINT ALSO SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES REASONS FOR NOT NAMING ALLEGEDLY NON-EXISTENT ENTITY AS A DEFENDANT. APPLICATION OF CCC 2945.1(B)(1) EXCEPTION TO TRANSACTION AT ISSUE IS A QUESTION OF FACT. FRAUD IS SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED. DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO LINNEKES, AS INDIVIDUAL, AS TO FRAUD CAUSE OF ACTION; SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION TO ALLEGE CONTRACT. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER ADOPTING THE TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Off Calendar Jul-10-2013 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-10-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-17-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-03-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT HOME CREDIT LAW CENTER and BRIAN LINNEKENS's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained in part and overruled in part. OVERRULED as to Linnekens, dba Home Credit Law Center. Complaint sufficiently alleges engagement of Home Credit Law Center for loan analysis and modification purposes. See SAC 8-9, Exs. A, B and C. Complaint also sufficiently alleges reasons for not naming allegedly non-existent entity as a defendant. Application of CCC 2945.1(b)(1) exception to transaction at issue is a question of fact. Fraud is sufficiently alleged. Demurrer is OVERRULED as to Linnekes, as individual, as to fraud cause of action; SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE to amend as to other causes of action to allege contract. Prevailing party to prepare order adopting the tentative ruling. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT

Moving party to comply with SFLR 2.6B and C and provide courtesy copies of demurer and Second Amended Complaint to Department 501 not later than May 17, 2013. Judge A. James Robertson II, Clerk: M. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-02-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANTS BRIAN R. LINNEKENS DBA HOME CREDIT LAW CENTER, BRIAN LINNEKENS DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT - This motion will be heard in Department 501 on the same day and time. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 = (302/MJM)

Defendants Home Credit Law Center And Brian R. Linnekens' Demurrer To Plaintiff'S First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-02-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brian r. Linnekens (310-854-4245) of Law Offices of Brian R. Linnekens for Home Creid Law Center and Brian R. Linnekns, defendants and moving parties / Andrey Kalinin (415-386-8136) for Cuong Thanh Tran, plaintiff and opposing party

HEARING - Court tentatively rules as follows: Defendants' demurrer to plaintiff's First Amended Complaint is overruled as to the first cause of action; sustained with leave to amend as to second cause of action to allege particularity; sustained with leave to amend as to third and fourth causes of action to allege facts indicating moving party subject to statutory provisions. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as stated. Defendant to prepare proposed order in conformity with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)
